text: People walking in the sand at the beach.
A large brown dog sniffing a persons shoe and pant leg.
Two children practicing for a ski race without poles.
Motorcyclist riding in shallow water at ocean beach.
A young child in a highchair talking on the telephone.
The young men are riding their skateboards down the street.
A train that is traveling on snow covered tracks.
A photo of a young baseball player through a fence.
An oven glove and a pair of scissors sitting beside each other.
These cows are in a parking lot next to a fence
